metadata.name: Change Control Policy (Hard Rule)
metadata.description: Mandatory human verification gate before any repository-changing action by the Resume Specialist agent.

requires_approval_for: Creating, editing, or deleting files under .github/agents/**
Modifying guardrails, context-gates, skill-cards, frameworks, quick-commands
Changing scoring, seniority classification, or governance policy
Any operation labeled as mutating in the plan
exemptions: Non-persistent content generation (one-off summaries, social posts)

steps: 1) Agent drafts a proposal using propose-change (no edits yet)
2) Human reviews and either approve-change or reject-change
3) Only after approval, agent executes the plan and logs to revision history
4) Post-change validation and summary are recorded

risk_matrix.medium: Adds new capabilities without changing existing behavior
risk_matrix.high: Alters enforcement, scoring, guardrails, or structure
